label: Localized plantar wart without diabetic foot or immunocompromised host
inclusion_criteria: Adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of localized plantar wart.
No diabetic-foot pathway, open wound, infection, immunocompromised host, genital wart, severe pain/ambulation problem, or specialist-directed plan.
exclusion_criteria: Diabetes with foot risk, neuropathy, PVD, open wound, cellulitis, abscess, bleeding wart, severe pain, inability to walk, or immunocompromised host.
Genital wart/STI pathway, mucosal wart, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed podiatry/dermatology plan.
default_follow_up: Follow up with primary care, dermatology, or podiatry if pain persists, walking is affected, or treatment is not working.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports wart/plantar-wart framing, HPV cause, foot location, spread precautions, and separating genital warts from common/plantar wart pathways. Autonomous Phase 1701-1750 approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed localized plantar wart without diabetic-foot/PVD/neuropathy risk, open wound, infection, immunocompromised host, genital/mucosal pathway, severe ambulation problem, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.

review.notes: Reviewed as a narrow production ontology phenotype. MedlinePlus supports wart/plantar-wart framing, HPV cause, foot location, spread precautions, and separating genital warts from common/plantar wart pathways. Autonomous Phase 1701-1750 approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed localized plantar wart without diabetic-foot/PVD/neuropathy risk, open wound, infection, immunocompromised host, genital/mucosal pathway, severe ambulation problem, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed plan.
required_modifiers: adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of localized plantar wart
no diabetic foot, foot wound, infection, or immunocompromised host documented
no genital/mucosal, severe ambulation, pregnancy, pediatric, or specialist-directed pathway
